title: Basic Needs
description: Learn basic needs in Filipino Sign Language

pages.title: Welcome to Basic Needs
pages.content: In this lesson, you'll learn how to sign basic needs in Filipino Sign Language (FSL). You'll learn 9 important signs with step-by-step instructions and practice questions.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Food'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Food'. Any nutritious substance that people or animals eat or drink, or that plants absorb, in order to maintain life and growth. 

How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'flat O' handshape (fingertips touching thumb). 2. Tap the fingertips to the mouth/chin area once or twice.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Water'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Water'. A colorless, transparent, odorless liquid that forms the seas, lakes, rivers, and rain. 

How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'W' handshape. 2. Tap the three fingers on the chin once or twice.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Shelter'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Shelter'. A place giving temporary protection from bad weather or danger. 

How to sign:
1. Use both hands in the 'A' or 'S' handshape (fists), held vertically, palms facing each other. 2. Tap the wrists/forearms together. 3. Arc the hands slightly over the head.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Sleep'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Sleep'. A naturally recurring state of rest for the mind and body. 

How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the '5' handshape (open) above the face. 2. Move the hand down, closing it into a 'flat O' handshape while touching the chin/cheek area.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Safety'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Safety'. The condition of being protected from or unlikely to cause danger, risk, or injury. 

How to sign:
1. Use both hands in the 'S' handshape (fists), dominant hand on top of non-dominant, arms crossed slightly. 2. Swing the fists outward and down in unison.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Health care'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Health care'. The maintenance and improvement of health via the prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of illness, injury, and other physical and mental impairments. 

How to sign:
1. Sign HEALTH: Use both '5' hands. 2. Tap the dominant middle finger on the shoulder, then tap the non-dominant middle finger on the chest.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Clothing'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Clothing'. Items worn to cover the body. 

How to sign:
1. Use both hands in the '5' handshape (palms facing in). 2. Brush the hands down the sides of the chest/body repeatedly.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Urinate'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Urinate'. To excrete urine. 

How to sign:
1. Use the dominant hand in the 'U' handshape (index and middle fingers extended), palm facing down. 2. Move the hand forward from the crotch area.

pages.title: How to Sign 'Comfort Room'
pages.content:
Learn how to sign 'Comfort Room'. Euphemism for restroom or bathroom. 

How to sign:
1. Sign BATHROOM: Use the dominant hand in the 'T' handshape (thumb between index and middle fingers). 2. Shake the hand twice in space.
